/usr/bin/libtool -c -static -o libimgui.a CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/examples/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/imgui.dir/examples/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o
